summary: Full backend + frontend testing for UR SETUP bilingual gaming accessories site. All 12 pytest backend tests PASS. Frontend flows (language toggle, product quickview, review modal + submission, newsletter, FAQ accordion, back-to-top, WhatsApp float, external salla.sa target=_blank links) all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup') — consider migrating to lifespan handler
CORS allow_origins=['*'] with allow_credentials=True — browsers will reject credentialed CORS requests; harmless here since no auth, but flag for future
/api/contact accepts payload: dict without Pydantic model — no email format validation; consider ContactIn model with EmailStr
seed_data_creation: Added 2 TEST_ reviews and multiple pwtest*@ex.com newsletter subs during testing (via API + UI)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend API endpoints (/api/, /api/reviews GET/POST, /api/reviews?product=, /api/reviews/summary, /api/newsletter (idempotent), /api/stats, /api/contact) verified. Frontend tested at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. data-testids present: lang-toggle, product-quickview-{slug}, write-review-btn, review-modal, review-star-{n}, review-name-input, review-comment-input, review-submit-btn, newsletter-input, newsletter-submit, back-to-top. Reviews seed happens only when collection empty; DB already seeded with 6 + test reviews (~8+ now).
